# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Use [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) as the primary source of repository-specific instructions.

When working in this repository:

- Read [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) before making non-trivial changes.
- Follow the testing and acceptance checklist in [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) before finishing work.
- Prefer the repository conventions described there over generic defaults.

If this file and [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) ever disagree, treat [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) as the source of truth for project behavior and expectations.
